name: regulatory_filing
description: a regulatory filing-calendar world (e.g. SEC); actions prepare, file, amend, mark_late

card.description: a regulatory filing-calendar world (e.g. SEC); actions prepare, file, amend, mark_late

rules: Time advances by one calendar day on every action (params={'days': n} skips ahead n days).
'days_remaining' always equals deadline - today; it goes negative once the deadline has passed.
'prepare' marks the filing as prepared; it is allowed only before the filing is submitted and is idempotent.
'file' submits a prepared filing exactly once; it requires 'prepared' to be true and 'filed' to be false.
A filing submitted after the deadline (today > deadline) sets late_flag and accrues PENALTY_PER_DAY for each overdue day.
'amend' is allowed only after the filing has been submitted; each amend increments the amendment count.
'mark_late' applies only once the deadline has passed without a timely filing; it sets the penalty to the overdue-day count times PENALTY_PER_DAY.
State is symbolic and deterministic: the same (state, action) always yields the same next state.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    PENALTY_PER_DAY = 100

    # The calendar always advances first: every action consumes >= 1 day.
    days = params.get("days", 1)
    if not isinstance(days, int) or days < 1:
        days = 1
    s["today"] = int(s.get("today", 0)) + days
    deadline = int(s.get("deadline", 0))
    s["days_remaining"] = deadline - s["today"]

    log = list(s.get("log", []))

    def overdue(day):
        return max(0, day - deadline)

    if name == "prepare":
        # Draft the filing. Allowed any time before it is filed; idempotent once
        # prepared. Does not by itself satisfy the deadline.
        if not s.get("filed", False):
            s["prepared"] = True
            if not s.get("late_flag", False):
                s["status"] = "prepared"
            log.append("day %d: prepared %s" % (s["today"], s.get("filing_type")))

    elif name == "file":
        # Submit the prepared filing to the regulator. Requires a prepared draft
        # and that it has not already been filed. Lateness is judged at filing.
        if s.get("prepared", False) and not s.get("filed", False):
            s["filed"] = True
            s["filed_on"] = s["today"]
            late_days = overdue(s["today"])
            if late_days > 0:
                s["late_flag"] = True
                s["penalty"] = int(s.get("penalty", 0)) + late_days * PENALTY_PER_DAY
                s["status"] = "filed"
            else:
                s["status"] = "filed"
            log.append("day %d: filed %s (%d day(s) %s deadline)" % (
                s["today"], s.get("filing_type"),
                abs(s["days_remaining"]),
                "past" if late_days > 0 else "before/on"))

    elif name == "amend":
        # Correct a filing already submitted. Requires a prior filing; bumps the
        # amendment count and reflects it in the status.
        if s.get("filed", False):
            s["amendments"] = int(s.get("amendments", 0)) + 1
            s["status"] = "amended"
            log.append("day %d: amended %s (amendment #%d)" % (
                s["today"], s.get("filing_type"), s["amendments"]))

    elif name == "mark_late":
        # Administratively flag the filing as delinquent. Meaningful only once the
        # deadline has passed without a timely submission; sets the accrued
        # penalty to the current number of overdue days.
        late_days = overdue(s["today"])
        if late_days > 0 and not (s.get("filed", False) and not s.get("late_flag", False)):
            s["late_flag"] = True
            s["penalty"] = late_days * PENALTY_PER_DAY
            if not s.get("filed", False):
                s["status"] = "late"
            log.append("day %d: marked %s late (%d day(s) overdue)" % (
                s["today"], s.get("filing_type"), late_days))

    s["log"] = log
    return s

emit.report: Filing {filing_type}: status={status} on day {today} (deadline day {deadline}, {days_remaining} day(s) remaining). Filed on day {filed_on}; {amendments} amendment(s); late={late_flag}; penalty={penalty}.

objectives.name: timely_filing
objectives.goal: file the report on or before the deadline (avoid late_flag)
